turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, mujhe ek appointment chahiye. Dermatology ke liye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul, aap sahi jagah call kiye hain. Aapka naam aur contact number bata sakte hain?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you Rahul ji. Dermatology mein Dr. Sneha Kulkarni available hain. Aapko kab convenient hai — weekday ya weekend?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Weekday theek hai, actually Saturday bhi chalega agar ho toh.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Saturday ko Dr. Kulkarni 11 AM se 1 PM tak available hain. Koi specific time preferred hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, 11:30 AM Saturday ko book kar diya Rahul ji. SMS confirmation aayega aapke number pe. Kuch aur help chahiye?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Nahi, bas itna hi. Thank you!
